title: Extract self-contained MindfulnessGuide component from PreMeditationPage

requirements.summary: Create a new MindfulnessGuide component that encapsulates the meditation guide section currently rendered inside PreMeditationPage, including its container, title, step content, and MeditationGuideStepper
acceptanceCriteria: The component renders the guide container, title, and step content independently.
No meditation-guide UI markup remains duplicated in `PreMeditationPage`; the page simply renders `<MindfulnessGuide ... />`.
Visual appearance of the guide section is unchanged.

file_operations.description: Create a new MindfulnessGuide component that accepts meditationType as a prop and renders the meditation guide section with its container, title, step content, and MeditationGuideStepper. The component should extract all guide-related markup currently in PreMeditationPage, maintaining the same visual styling and layout structure. Use the meditation type content data to display the appropriate guide information.

requirements.summary: Move the More Details button and its navigation logic (routing to the Knowledge page) entirely inside the MindfulnessGuide component
acceptanceCriteria: The `MindfulnessGuide` component internally calls the router's navigate function (or equivalent) to go to the Knowledge page when More Details is clicked.
`PreMeditationPage` passes no `onMoreDetails` callback or navigation handler to the guide component.
Clicking More Details still navigates to the Knowledge page correctly.

file_operations.description: Add internal navigation logic to the MindfulnessGuide component using TanStack Router's useNavigate hook. Implement a More Details button click handler that navigates to the Knowledge page route with the appropriate meditation type parameter. Remove any dependency on parent component callbacks for this navigation action.

requirements.summary: Move the Previous and Next step-navigation button logic (current step index state, increment/decrement handlers, boundary conditions) entirely inside the MindfulnessGuide component
acceptanceCriteria: Step index state (`useState`) for the guide stepper lives inside `MindfulnessGuide`, not in `PreMeditationPage`.
`PreMeditationPage` passes no step index, `onNext`, or `onPrevious` props to the guide component.
Previous/Next navigation within the guide works correctly end-to-end.
Boundary behavior (disable or hide buttons at first/last step) is handled inside the component.

file_operations.description: Add internal state management for the current step index using useState. Implement onNext and onPrevious handlers that increment/decrement the step index with proper boundary checking (don't go below 0 or above the last step). Pass this internal state and handlers to MeditationGuideStepper. Ensure boundary behavior (disabled/hidden buttons) is managed within the component.

requirements.summary: Update PreMeditationPage to replace all extracted guide-related markup and state with a single MindfulnessGuide component usage
acceptanceCriteria: `PreMeditationPage` contains a single `<MindfulnessGuide>` element where the guide section previously existed.
No guide-specific `useState` hooks, step handlers, or More Details handlers remain in `PreMeditationPage`.
The rest of the pre-meditation page (mood/energy selectors, timer settings, ambient sound, start button) is unaffected.

file_operations.description: Replace all meditation guide-related markup, state variables (step index), and handlers (onNext, onPrevious, More Details navigation) with a single <MindfulnessGuide meditationType={selectedType} /> component usage. Import the new MindfulnessGuide component at the top of the file. Remove any orphaned state, handlers, or JSX fragments related to the guide section. Ensure the mood/energy selectors, duration input, ambient music carousel, and start button sections remain untouched and fully functional.
